title: T-006 — scheduler_scenarios table (P2 what-if)
prompt:
# T-006 — scheduler_scenarios table (P2 what-if)

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §9.7, §17.1 PLE-008
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Introduce `scheduler_scenarios` table for P2 what-if simulations (saved scenarios, never committed to scheduler_assignments) with RLS and FK to scheduler_runs.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration `packages/db/migrations/0075_scheduler_scenarios.sql`: CREATE TABLE scheduler_scenarios per §9.7 DDL + RLS.
2. scenario_params JSONB shape per PLE-008: {line_down:[...], add_wos:[...], remove_wos:[...], capacity_changes:[...]}.
3. Drizzle schema entry.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0075_scheduler_scenarios.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/scheduler_scenarios.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/scheduler-scenarios.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0075 applied, when \d scheduler_scenarios runs, then all §9.7 columns + RLS + FK to scheduler_runs(run_id) exist
2. Given two tenants, when each SELECTs, then each sees only its own scenarios
3. Given a scenario row, when scenario_params is INSERTed without required keys, then JSON validation passes (shape enforced at app layer not DB)

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/db/__tests__/scheduler-scenarios.test.ts asserting RLS + FK to scheduler_runs
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test scheduler-scenarios'

## Risk red lines
- Do not couple to scheduler_assignments (P2 simulations never commit to assignments)
- Do not skip RLS
- Do not enforce JSONB shape at DB layer (per PRD app-layer validation)

pipeline_inputs.description: Create scheduler_scenarios table for P2 what-if simulations with RLS and FK to baseline scheduler_runs.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration 0075 emits CREATE TABLE scheduler_scenarios per §9.7 DDL. scenario_params JSONB and result_summary JSONB hold scenario inputs/outputs. RLS + tenant policy. Drizzle schema with proper UUID/JSONB/TIMESTAMPTZ types. RED test verifies FK + RLS.

Do not enforce scenario_params JSON shape at DB layer
